Package org.solenopsis.soap.partner

Class DescribePathAssistant

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.partner.DescribePathAssistant
public class DescribePathAssistant extends Object

Java class for DescribePathAssistant complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DescribePathAssistant">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="active" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="animationRule" type="{urn:partner.soap.sforce.com}DescribeAnimationRule" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="apiName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="pathPicklistField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="picklistsForRecordType" type="{urn:partner.soap.sforce.com}PicklistForRecordType" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recordTypeId" type="{urn:partner.soap.sforce.com}ID"/>
         <element name="steps" type="{urn:partner.soap.sforce.com}DescribePathAssistantStep" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

      public void setActive(boolean value)

    • getAnimationRule

      public List<DescribeAnimationRule> getAnimationRule()
      Gets the value of the animationRule property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the animationRule property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getAnimationRule().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DescribeAnimationRule

      Returns:
      The value of the animationRule property.

      public List<PicklistForRecordType> getPicklistsForRecordType()
      Gets the value of the picklistsForRecordType property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the picklistsForRecordType property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getPicklistsForRecordType().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list PicklistForRecordType

      Returns:
      The value of the picklistsForRecordType property.

      public List<DescribePathAssistantStep> getSteps()
      Gets the value of the steps property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the steps property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getSteps().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DescribePathAssistantStep

      Returns:
      The value of the steps property.
